title: Fix question insertion, inline editing, and Column A/Column B layouts in Paper Editor

requirements.text: Fix the Question Bank “Use” action so that it inserts the full selected question object into the target paper section (not only plain text). The inserted question must preserve all supported fields (e.g., questionType, mcqOptions, fillInBlankData, trueFalseData, matchPairsData, tableData, imageAttachment, and any rich cell content/images), while generating a new unique question id and setting headingId appropriately for the destination section.

quotes: Insert question from question bank and ai button in paper editor is not inserting questions

acceptanceCriteria: From the Paper Editor flow (using the insert context), clicking “Use” on a Question Bank item adds a new question to the chosen paper section and the user is navigated back to the Real Paper editor.
The inserted question is a deep copy of the source question’s structure/content (including options and images), except for a new unique id.
The inserted question appears in the editor with the same question type and renders correctly (MCQ, match-pairs, table, etc.).

If the destination section has headings, the inserted question is assigned to the section’s active/first heading (do not leave headingId null if headings exist), so it is visible under that heading in the PaperSurface list.

requirements.text: Fix the AI “Add to Paper” insertion so that it reliably inserts questions into the paper editor section indicated by the insert context, and ensure the inserted items are full Question objects consistent with the app’s Question model (including correct questionType and headingId assignment).

quotes: Insert question from question bank and ai button in paper editor is not inserting questions

acceptanceCriteria: When navigating from a paper editor to the AI Assistant with an insert context set, selecting generated questions and clicking “Add to Paper” adds them to the correct paper section and returns to the Real Paper editor.
Inserted AI questions appear under the correct section heading (headingId set when headings exist).
No insertion occurs when there is no insert context; the UI shows a clear error message and does not crash.

requirements.text: Enable inline editing for personal questions in the Question Bank. The “Edit” action must allow editing the question text directly within the list item/card and persist changes to the personal question store.

quotes: And edit option in both question bank is not allowing to edit taxt currently

acceptanceCriteria: In the Question Bank “My Questions” tab, clicking “Edit” toggles the question card into an editable state (e.g., textarea/input) without navigating away.
Edits can be saved (e.g., via a Save/Done control or by toggling Edit off) and are persisted using the existing store update method so they remain after refresh.
Cancelling/discarding edits (if provided) does not mutate stored data.
Editing does not break the “Use” button behavior.

requirements.text: Update the match-pairs (Column A / Column B) editor and renderer so that Column A and Column B are always displayed strictly side-by-side, including on narrow/mobile screens (use horizontal scrolling or constrained layout rather than stacking vertically).

quotes: it is not showing  column a and column b side by side

acceptanceCriteria: For match-pairs questions, Column A and Column B remain in a two-column layout at all viewport widths (no stacking).
On small screens, the pair area remains usable (e.g., allows horizontal scroll within the question block) without breaking the rest of the page layout.
Both editor mode and read/print renderer mode reflect the side-by-side requirement consistently.

requirements.text: Improve the table question UI: show “Column A” and “Column B” headers, make those headers editable, and render darker borders (inner grid lines darker than current; outermost border also dark and clearly visible).

quotes: table option is also working good but not showing column a and column b written on it add it and make it editable and it's border must be dark then other and outer most line also should be dark

acceptanceCriteria: Table questions render visible headers labeled “Column A” and “Column B” by default.
Users can edit the header text inline; changes persist in the question’s table data model and are reflected in both editor and renderer views.
Table borders are visually darker than before, with the outside border and header separators also rendered in dark border styling.
The styling works in both normal view and print view (no missing borders when printing).

requirements.text: Reduce excessive blank/unused space when an image is inserted into a table cell so that the cell height more closely fits the image and surrounding content (minimize extra whitespace while keeping resizing controls functional).

quotes: image inserted in table box is working but using lots of blank space(you can see in second image)make it minimum

acceptanceCriteria: After inserting/pasting an image into a table cell, the cell does not expand to an unnecessarily tall area; whitespace above/below the image is minimized.
The image remains visible and controllable (resize/alignment controls still work).
The change does not regress text editing within the same cell and does not break print rendering of table cell images.

constraints: Use English for all user-facing text.
Do not modify files under frontend/immutablePaths (compose existing UI components instead of editing them).
Backend must remain single-actor; only add backend methods if strictly required by the requested fixes (prefer fixing the current frontend mock-store flow).
nonGoals: Implementing real backend persistence for papers/questions (beyond current localStorage/mock store).
Adding new authentication providers beyond Internet Identity.
Introducing new question types or redesigning the overall navigation/route structure.
